source_pr.title: stats: fix data race when updating stats cache
source_pr.body:
<!--
Thank you for contributing to TiDB! Please read TiDB's [CONTRIBUTING](https://github.com/pingcap/community/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md) document **BEFORE** filing this PR.
-->

### What problem does this PR solve? <!--add issue link with summary if exists-->

When stats update cache, it does not consider that there maybe another writter at the same time, so it is possible that the newer updates maybe rewritten by older updates, which lead to after a call of `Update`, it does has the latest stats cache.

### What is changed and how it works?

Store the `latestVersion` at the same place with stats cache, so we need to updat e them together and check their versions when updating.

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

 - Unit test

Code changes

 - Has exported function/method change

Side effects

 - None

Related changes

 - Need to cherry-pick to the release branch

Release note

 - Fix data race when updating stats cache.
